validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_marker_api' appears in category at least 5 times in table events_args
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_marker_api' category entries are fewer than expected in events_args
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_marker_api';

validation_queries.error_message: Empty or NULL category entries found in events_args
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category IS NULL OR TRIM(category) = '';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_marker_api' appears in category 10 times in 'regions' table
validation_queries.error_message: Less than 10 'rocm_marker_api' entries in the 'regions' table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_marker_api';

validation_queries.description: Ensure there are no rocTX API calls that last 0 seconds
validation_queries.error_message: Found rocTX API captures where duration is 0
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_marker_api' AND duration = 0;

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column of regions
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the name column of regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'roctxMarkA' appears at 5 times in table 'regions'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_marker_api' AND name = 'roctxMarkA';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'roctxRangePop' appears at 3 times in table 'regions'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_marker_api' AND name = 'roctxRangePop';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'roctxRangeStop' appears at 2 times in table 'regions'
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_marker_api' AND name = 'roctxRangeStop';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_marker_api' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_marker_api' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_marker_api%';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'roctx' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'roctx' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%roctx%';
